data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of integration with onboarding workflows as specified in the linked use case. However, the evidence provided does not demonstrate any concrete implementation or functionality related to this integration. The linked use case mentions the need for integration, but there is no supporting evidence to confirm that this requirement is met, indicating a clear gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of integration with onboarding workflows.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
